description: The English Premier League (EPL) is the highest level of professional soccer in England and is widely regarded as one of the most competitive and popular leagues in the world. Founded in 1992, the league features 20 clubs from England and Wales competing each season for the Premier League title. Teams play 38 matches in a home-and-away format, with the top clubs qualifying for European competitions and the bottom three clubs relegated to the EFL Championship. Known for its passionate supporters, iconic stadiums, and world-class players, the Premier League attracts millions of fans across the globe.
